query: SELECT id, name, moduleId, initialStateJson FROM scenarios WHERE moduleId = 1 AND isActive = 1 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M2p26uMeyZfN57L.7f2cda2e67ce --database S5Kvdsbv47gJwCwLVS8V8T --execute SELECT id, name, moduleId, initialStateJson FROM scenarios WHERE moduleId = 1 AND isActive = 1 LIMIT 5;

rows.name: Scénario 2 — Réception fantôme (GR non postée)
